name: Detect Thoughts
description: You activate one of the effects below. Until the spell ends, you can activate either effect as a Magic action on your later turns. (1) Sense Thoughts — sense the presence of thoughts within 30 feet of yourself that belong to creatures that know languages or are telepathic. (2) Probe Mind — choose a creature you can see within 30 feet; it makes a Wisdom saving throw against your spell save DC. On a failure, you can read its surface thoughts (what it is thinking about in this moment) for as long as you concentrate.
